[DQC.US.0124.9586] The element FinanceLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent with a value of 4,453,000 has been used in the filing but does not appear in the financial statements of the filing. This disclosure should appear in the face financials unless it is included in another account caption. If this is the case either: 1. The element FinanceLeaseLiabilityNoncurrentStatementOfFinancialPositionExtensibleList should be used to identify the account where the Finance Lease liability Noncurrent is included; or 2. The Balance Sheet location axis should be used with two or more account members to identify into which financial statement captions the Finance Lease liability Noncurrent has been apportioned.
Period :2024-12-31 Dimensions : Unit : USD Decimals: -3
